# virtualbox_disk (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    virtualbox = {
      source = "registry.terraform.io/namnd/virtualbox"
    }
  }
}

provider "virtualbox" {}

resource "virtualbox_disk" "example" {
  file_path = "/data/example.vdi"
  size      = 20480
  format    = "VDI"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `file_path` (String) Absolute path for the disk file.
- `size` (Number) Disk size in megabytes.

### Optional

- `format` (String) Disk format. Must be one of: `VDI`, `VMDK`, `VHD`.
- `variant` (String) Disk variant. Must be one of: `Standard`, `Fixed`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the disk medium.
- `last_updated` (String)
